headline: Constellium, IBD Stock Of The Day, Forges Bullish Entry After 72% Rally Amid Accelerating Growth
summary: Stock Of The Day: Constellium earnings and sales growth are accelerating amid strong aluminum prices and demand. Shares are setting up after a big rally.

headline: The Destruction of Peloton Continues
summary: No matter how smart the ideas may have been, or how many top managers Peloton (NASDAQ: PTON) has hired, the company has been ruined, and the events that destroyed it have finally dragged it under. Its run is over Peloton did well during the COVID-19 pandemic. As the Harvard Business Review analysis pointed out in ... The Destruction of Peloton Continues

headline: What's Behind Ford's Approval of a New Share Repurchase Plan?
summary: F approves a modest buyback of up to 31.7M shares to offset dilution from stock compensation and convertible notes, reinforcing shareholder value focus.
